data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of AI-generated parameters but lacks concrete evidence to confirm whether the scenario behavior is supported or if it produces a clear failure report. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not provide specific details or results related to the validation of AI-generated parameters, leading to an inconclusive assessment. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence to assert a definitive outcome.
gaps: No evidence of validation results for AI-generated parameters.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for AI-generated parameters validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define specific tests and expected outcomes for validating AI-generated parameters.
